title: The Hill
lines: You have dismantled your meager shelter and stand upon the windswept crest of the hill, gazing down into the valley that seems to warp and stretch before your eyes.

To the left, a jagged path winds toward the fog-shrouded village. To the right, a solitary figure—a farmer—gestures frantically at a slab of black glass in his hand, his movements jerky and alien against the backdrop of the swaying, golden wheat.
The grass beneath your feet is a sickly, vibrant green, and the air carries a metallic tang that makes your teeth ache. It is an ideal spot for a final meal before you descend into the unknown.

options.desc: 1. Have a picnic upon the sickly grass
3. Investigate the frantic farmer in the fields
